name: VYNE Therapeutics Inc.
business: VYNE Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing therapies for inflammatory and immune-mediated conditions. Its lead programs include VYN202, an oral BD2-selective BET inhibitor, and previously repibresib, a topical pan-BD BET inhibitor. The company also receives royalty revenue from licensing Finacea foam to LEO Pharma.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing differentiated therapies to treat inflammatory and immune-mediated conditions with high unmet need.

If our information technology systems or those third parties upon which we rely or our data, are or were compromised, we could experience adverse consequences resulting from such compromise, including but not limited to regulatory investigations or actions, litigation, fines and penalties, disruptions of our business operations, reputational harm, loss of revenue or profits and other adverse consequences.

catalysts.event: Completion of repeat non-clinical toxicology study of VYN202 in male dogs
catalysts.sentence: The study is expected to be completed in the second half of 2026, with a final report expected in the fourth quarter of 2026.

We anticipate that the Merger will close in the second quarter of 2026, subject to the satisfaction of certain closing conditions, along with the concurrent Yarrow Pre-Closing Financing (as described below).
